event.name: Bachata After Dark
event.subtitle: Free Class by Daniel Sensual
event.time: Free Bachata Class after 9 PM · Social until midnight
event.address: 100 S Eola Dr, Ste 104, Orlando, FL
event.description: Weekly Wednesday bachata night on Lake Eola. Free beginner-friendly class by Daniel Sensual at 9 PM, then social dancing until midnight. Sensual bachata, Dominican classics, and modern remixes. All levels welcome.

nightFlow.label: Free Bachata Class
nightFlow.desc: Daniel Sensual opens the night with a free, beginner-friendly bachata class.

nightFlow.label: Social Opens
nightFlow.desc: The floor opens into social dancing as the room warms up.

nightFlow.label: After Dark
nightFlow.desc: Deeper cuts, closer energy, and the after-dark mood fully lands.

nightFlow.label: Last Dance
nightFlow.desc: One final round before the night closes on Lake Eola.

post.text:
🌙 BACHATA AFTER DARK — This Wednesday

Free bachata class by Daniel Sensual at 9 PM
Social dancing until midnight

📍 Eola Lounge · 100 S Eola Dr, Ste 104, Orlando
💰 Free until 9 PM · $10 after

Sensual bachata, Dominican classics, modern remixes. All levels welcome.

RSVP → danielsensual.com/bachata

#BachataAfterDark #BachataOrlando #DanielSensual #OrlandoDance #FreeBachataClass
